Index.title: Kalmeron — The AI Operating System for Arab Founders
Index.description: 57 specialised AI assistants across 7 departments work as your complete founding team — in native Arabic. From idea analysis and business plans to legal, financial modelling, and the Egyptian market.

Common.tagline: The AI operating system for Arab founders

CTA.primarySignup: Start free — no credit card required
CTA.buildFirstDept: Build your first department in 5 minutes
CTA.returnLogin: Welcome back — your work is waiting
CTA.bookCall: Book a call with our team

Trust.label: Trusted by 1,200+ founders across 12 Arab countries

hero.eyebrow: Kalmeron · 57 AI assistants for Arab founders
hero.subtitleLead: Instead of spending thousands on a financial advisor, lawyer, and market analyst,
hero.subtitleTail: work across 7 departments as your full team — built for the Egyptian and Arab market.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Write your idea or question — Kalmeron is ready now…

suggestions.platform: Analyse a learning platform idea for Egyptian freelancers
suggestions.ecommerce: Build a complete business plan for my online store
suggestions.healthtech: What are the best opportunities in Egypt's digital health sector?
suggestions.cloudKitchen: Calculate startup costs and break-even for a cloud kitchen

sidebar.noConversations: No conversations yet — ask your first question
sidebar.secureFooter: Your conversations are fully saved and encrypted

ideaAnalyst.label: Idea Analyst
ideaAnalyst.prompt: Run a comprehensive analysis of my idea — market size, competitors, opportunities, and risks in the Egyptian market.

businessPlan.label: Business Plan
businessPlan.prompt: Help me build a professional, investor-ready business plan with financial projections and target market analysis.

mistakeShield.label: Mistake Shield
mistakeShield.prompt: What are the most common fatal mistakes when founding a company in Egypt, and how do I avoid them?

opportunityRadar.label: Opportunity Radar
opportunityRadar.prompt: Tell me about the latest funding rounds, grants, hackathons, and startup events in Egypt and the region.

cfo.label: AI CFO
cfo.prompt: Build me a preliminary financial model with break-even analysis, runway calculation, and revenue projections.

legal.label: Legal Guide
legal.prompt: What are the legal steps to incorporate my company in Egypt, and what documents do I need?

emptyState.description: 57 specialised AI assistants across 7 departments at your service — built for the Egyptian and Arab market. Ask me anything: your idea, business plan, financials, legal setup, or the best opportunities in your sector.

suggestions.pharmacy: Analyse my pharmacy-delivery app idea for the Egyptian market
suggestions.marketing: Build a marketing plan for a new food product in the local market
suggestions.saas: What are the step-by-step requirements to set up a SaaS company in Egypt?
suggestions.breakeven: Calculate the break-even for a restaurant with 300k EGP startup capital
suggestions.company: Explain the practical difference between a joint-stock and a partnership company in Egypt
suggestions.subscription: Is a book Subscription Box a viable idea in Egypt? Let's analyse it

toasts.fileExtracted: Content extracted and added to the conversation.
toasts.fileTooLarge: File exceeds the 10 MB size limit.
toasts.fileError: Could not process the file — please try again.
toasts.messageTooLong: Message is too long — shorten it slightly and resend.
toasts.genericError: An unexpected error occurred — please try again.

LearnedSkills.title: Learned Skills
LearnedSkills.subtitle: Kalmeron learns and improves with every task — skills are automatically distilled after each successful task and reused for better performance.
LearnedSkills.empty: No skills distilled yet — they will be built automatically after each successful task.

details.noEvolution: No evolution chain yet — this is a first-generation skill.

ComingSoon.earlyAccessDescription: Leave your email and company name — we'll notify you the moment this feature ships.

ApiKeys.title: API Keys
ApiKeys.intro: Connect Kalmeron to your external systems via secure API keys. Create a key, scope its permissions, and use it from your application or platform.
ApiKeys.scopesTitle: What you can do with the API

scopes.agents: Run AI assistants on your own data
scopes.documents: Upload and index documents in your knowledge base
scopes.webhooks: Subscribe to real-time events and notifications

Webhooks.title: Webhooks
Webhooks.intro: Receive instant notifications the moment any important event occurs in your account. Power full automation, integrations, and monitoring dashboards.

events.agentActionExecuted: An AI assistant executed an action
events.approvalRequested: A new approval request needs your decision

CashRunway.title: Cash Runway Calculator
CashRunway.subtitle: Know in seconds how many months you have before your cash runs out — and plan your next move with confidence.
CashRunway.result: You have {months} months of runway left
CashRunway.warning: ⚠️ Warning: less than 6 months — review your financial model and consider fundraising now.
CashRunway.healthy: ✅ Healthy position — keep growing and build your reserve.
CashRunway.infinite: 🚀 Your cash is growing — you are in an excellent position.
CashRunway.noBurn: Enter a valid burn figure to compute your runway.
CashRunway.alarmThresholdLabel: Alert me when runway drops below
CashRunway.alarmThresholdHint: An alert will appear on your dashboard when your balance falls below this threshold. Set it to 6 months for a useful action window.

Wellbeing.title: Founder Energy Quotient (MEQ)
Wellbeing.subtitle: Five minutes to gauge your mental wellbeing as a founder. Your answers are completely private — no one sees them.

questions.sleep: How was your sleep quality this past week?
questions.energy: How would you describe your daily energy level when you start work?
questions.focus: Can you focus for two consecutive hours on a single task without distraction?
questions.support: Do you have someone you trust to talk to about the pressures of building a company?
questions.purpose: Are you still excited about your company's vision five years from now?

results.thrive: 🌟 Thriving — keep your routine and protect your energy.
results.stable: ⚡ Stable — there's room to improve rest and your support circle.
results.atRisk: 🔴 At risk — take a day off and talk to someone you trust before pushing forward.
